top_signals.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
top_signals.summary: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently  – and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
